data.content:
Migration complete. All 2 tests pass. Here's a summary of changes:

**`TestProject.csproj`** — Replaced `xunit` 2.9.3 + `xunit.runner.visualstudio` + `Microsoft.NET.Test.Sdk` with single `xunit.v3` 3.2.2 package. Added `<OutputType>Exe</OutputType>` (v3 uses a built-in runner).

**`OrderedTests.cs`** — `[TestCaseOrderer("MyApp.Tests.AlphabeticalOrderer", "TestProject")]` → `[TestCaseOrderer(typeof(AlphabeticalOrderer))]` (v3 removed string-based constructor).

**`CustomCollectionFixture.cs`** — `[assembly: CollectionBehavior("...", "TestProject")]` → `[assembly: CollectionBehavior(typeof(...))]` (same reason).

**`AlphabeticalOrderer.cs`** *(new)* — Created concrete implementation of `ITestCaseOrderer` since v3 requires a real type reference. Orders by `TestCaseDisplayName` alphabetically.

**`global.json`** — Removed obsolete `test.runner` setting (v3 has its own built-in runner).
